title: Council worker claim assessment
description: One worker's structured assessment of one mathematical claim. Consumed by verdict_engine.py.

worker.description: provider that produced this: claude, gpt, gemini, grok, hermes, ...

ref.description: file path (lean), DOI/URL/theorem name (citation), else empty

verified.description: only true after an actual check; never self-asserted

breaks_at.description: the first failing step, if any

confidence.description: recorded but given no weight without evidence
